case_title: IXC HOLDINGS, INC., DBA TELEKENEX VS. WILD BRAIN INC. et al

docket_entries.description: RESPONSE TO OSC RE: FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE OF SUMMONS AND COMPLAINT ON DEFT WILD BRAIN, INC. FILED BY PLAINTIFF IXC HOLDINGS, INC., DBA TELEKENEX

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR APR-15-2014 CONTINUED TO JUN-10-2014 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). THE APR-15-2014 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF JUN-10-2014 IS OFF CALENDAR. DISMISSAL ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
RESPONSE TO OSC RE: FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE OF SUMMONS AND COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF IXC HOLDINGS, INC., DBA TELEKENEX
RESPONSE TO ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FILED BY PLAINTIFF IXC HOLDINGS, INC., DBA TELEKENEX

EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF IXC HOLDINGS, INC., DBA TELEKENEX AS TO DEFENDANT WILD BRAIN INC. WILD BRAIN ENTERTAINMENT, INC. DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  SEP-23-2013
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF IXC HOLDINGS, INC., DBA TELEKENEX SERVED MAR-28-2013, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT WILD BRAIN ENTERTAINMENT, INC.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR DEC-17-2013 CONTINUED TO APR-15-2014 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT WILD BRAIN INC.; OBTAIN ANSWER(S) FROM OR ENTER DEFAULT(S) AGAINST DEFENDANT(S) WILD BRAIN INC., AND WILD BRAIN ENTERTAINMENT, INC.. THE DEC-17-2013 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR DEC-17-2013 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 10:30 AM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF(S) OF SERVICE OF SUMMONS AND COMPLAINT ON DEFENDANT(S) WILD BRAIN INC. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITH PREJUDICE
